name: GOLFTEC Stonebrook
about: GOLFTEC Stonebrook is a high-tech golf training studio specializing in data-driven golf instruction and club fitting. The facility utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized coaching and practice sessions. Services include private golf lessons, club fitting with leading brands, and supervised practice memberships. The venue is designed for golfers seeking to improve their swing mechanics, gain course management skills, and receive expert club fitting to enhance distance and accuracy.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors
PGA-certified coaches with personalized improvement strategies
Comprehensive club fitting services with top brands
On-course application lessons for real-world improvement

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors mentioned for club fitting and swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and offers extensive club fitting services with top brands.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed at the facility.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact timing for 18-hole sessions, but mentions that practice sessions are designed to be efficient with coach-guided training plans.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility mentions programs for juniors and youth, and appears to be welcoming for beginner golfers of all ages.
